Portfolio update

Lots of trims today. $MU and $VRT because of ATR% extensions from the 50DSMA. $CGNX, $DDOG  and $IONQ small trims because of going into earnings. 

Stopped out of $CRWD and $FIVN.

Happy to have lightened up the portfolio slightly and bring exposure down just a notch. Not based on my gut feel that we're due for a pullback, but based on objective rules!

Added: $KMT because it looks fantastic. 

I'm hoping money will rotate out of the overheated groups like semis and into fresh setups like $KMT. With the melt-up we've been having in the indices however that might be a bit much to ask for but we'll see. 

Miners woke up a little yesterday. $SSRM had a great reacton to its ER. Worth keeping an eye on. 

I also tweeted about $OSS yesterday. HVE on a big ER. Speaking of fresh merchandise, this is now on watch. The list of big earnings winners is getting very long so plenty of oppurtunity ahead of us.

quoted_tweet.text:
Portfolio update

Euphoria kicking in. Everyone should take a minute to read this fantastic tweet by @Peoplewish : https://t.co/44VbyZSNIG

Open PNL is surging for a lot of people atm making people trim their positions. That is fine to an extent, but you do not want to cut your winners short trying to outsmart the moving averages. 

Your open PNL is going to take a hit at one point with stocks being overextended as they are. But do your trims based on objective rules. $MU becoming 10x ATR% extended from the 50DSMA is an objective trim for me, as an example. Closes below key moving averages can be an objective rule to trim, etc.

Don't just trim because you don't want to give back open PNL to the market gods. Accept that your PNL will make crazy swings at times like this and trust the HTF trend. You don't want to cut short the outlier trades that can make your entire career.

Just my two cents. 

Over to my portfolio, I didn't open new positions yesterday. Lots of charts are wide and loose and I'm good with what I have now. Earnings are coming up on some of my positions this week like $CGNX $IONQ $AMPX $DDOG so depending on my cushion I'll likely derisk some of them going into ER's.

Today probably again not a day for fresh longs so I'll mainly be managing my existing positions and observe earnings, especially interested in the $IGV names.
